body.title: Predictive coding signal — cloud escalations emit prediction errors
body.result: Already fully implemented (D279). _deposit_prediction_error() in main.py — fires after cloud escalation, deposits NARRATIVE_GAP(type=prediction_error_gap) to cortex. milieu.ingest_surprise() updates arousal/dominance on tier mismatch. NE._train_prediction_error() reinforces/weakens graph links. test_prediction_error.py has 8 tests. test_predictive_coding.py tests refractory behavior.
body.description: D277 gap. Biological pattern: brain continuously predicts input tier; updates weights when wrong. Igor implementation: after each turn, compare BG complexity estimate vs actual tier used. error = actual_tier - predicted_tier. If error > 0: emit NARRATIVE_GAP(type=prediction_error, intent=inferred_intent, tension proportional to tier gap). This feeds the self-training loop — cloud escalations become training signals pointing to exactly which intent class needs a plug. Files: main.py (post-turn hook), basal_ganglia.py (log predicted_tier in scoring), narrative_engine.py (emit gap). Inertia: MEDIUM (cognition). Related: T-self-training-loop, T-trails-infra.
